homepage.description: Ray Service, a.s. is a Czech innovative manufacturing and trading company providing outstanding solutions in cable harnesses, electromechanical assemblies, electronic equipment and cable components for a wide range of aviation and defence customers.

Open Day 2026
Come and see how things work here and experience our company first-hand. We will be here for you from 10:00 to 17:00.
What you can look forward to:
• a tour of our company
• information about what we do + answers to your questions
• a program for children
• light refreshments
• the opportunity to try a hands-on test for job applicants
We are mainly looking for ASSEMBLY WORKERS, but also office/technical positions.
You can already view open positions at: rayprace.cz
Follow us on Facebook or Instagram so you don’t miss any updates and news.
Instagram: @rayservice
We look forward to seeing you!
Ray Service, a.s.
Huštěnovská 2022
686 03 Staré Město
Ray Service Team
Ray Service at DSA 2026
Another trade show, another challenge.
This time, our colleagues have headed to Defence Services Asia in Kuala Lumpur 2026, where we are part of the Slovak pavilion – right at the heart of one of the region’s most significant defence exhibitions.
We don’t just bring catalogues.
We showcase real solutions that perform in real-world conditions – where reliability truly matters.
What can you find at our booth?
🔹 Interior lamp
🔹 Limit switches
🔹 EGIS
🔹 Cable harnesses
🔹 Electromechanical assemblies
Why does it work?
Because “everything under one roof” isn’t just a phrase for us.
From initial design through development and production to testing and after-sales service – we manage the entire lifecycle in-house.
That allows us to respond quickly, precisely, and without compromising on quality.
📍 Attending DSA 2026?
Stop by and let’s discuss how we can support your projects.
📍Ray Service, a.s., Hall 6, Stand 6880
Interview with Jakub Gabriel on the 2025 EY Awards
A recent interview with Jakub Gabriel was published in the local Staroměstské noviny.
What is it about?
We won the EY Entrepreneur of the Zlín Region award as well as the EY Technology Company of the Year 2025. In the interview, you can read what led us to this achievement and how Jakub Gabriel himself perceives it.
It’s not about big words.
It’s about what we genuinely live every day.
And perhaps that’s exactly why we’re especially proud to share it in our local newspaper — a platform that gives space to authentic stories.
👉 I’d definitely recommend giving the interview a read. You might see more than just a company in it. Maybe even a way of thinking that’s

Company introduction
Reliable and strong partner
Modern Czech company
Ray Service, headquartered in Staré Město, Czech Republic, is an international innovative
manufacturer of cable harnesses, electromechanical assemblies, and electronic equipment.
It is also
a distributor and integrator of cable components and system products.
More than 30 years of experience and intensive development have resulted in a strong, modern enterprise,
a reliable and sought-after partner
on an international level.
Renowned system integrator of electrical components
Our company is a reputable system integrator of
many world manufacturers of electrical components
– such as Amphenol, ITT Cannon, TE Connectivity
a Radiall and others. The company has been
successful and proved reliable in the highly
demanding military, aerospace and industrial
technology markets. On the Czech market it
is now significantly involved in the programs
of development and modernization of military
equipment of the Czech Army.
History
The Company's Roots Date Back to 1994
Foundation of the company
2001
The company’s first own building facility
2003
Expansion of production
2004
New production facility in Staré Město
2005
Extension of the product portfolio
2006
Expansion of the production space
2009
Foundation of a joint stock company
2014
Opening of the new central building
2016
Partnership with the HANZA Group
2018
Opening of Ray Service Slovakia
2020
Opening of Ray Service Austria
2022
Construction of the new Ray Service Facility in Staré Město
2023
Extension of storage and production capacities
Our philosophy
We do not rely on coincidence, we do not miss opportunities and we do not ignore challenges.
By pursuing the vision, fulfilling the mission, implementing corporate values, and by following the targeted strategic direction, we have laid a good foundation for the successful long-term and stable position of Ray Service.
Our philosophy
We consciously create
our future...
Mission
We are different than the others!
Our commitment to provide an excellent service, consciously and conscientiously, contributes to the success of our customers. Our distinctive approach to others and the strict and consistent attitude towards ourselves forms our individuality in the sense of being better, more reliable, and faster! We challenge ourselves. Only then can the customers be discerning with us – with a certainty that their needs and expectations will be met to their satisfaction.
Vision
Our goal is to be and remain a stable sought-after partner –
specialists in comprehensive services in the field of electrical systems for the military and aerospace industries
. We pride ourselves on the ability to anticipate and respond flexibly to market fluctuations and changes in customer needs. Using our own production capacity and productivity, we dare to far exceed the abilities of the competition and responsibly solve the customer's chronic time problems.
Company values
The year 2026 is ahead of us, and with it come clear values we want to build on at Ray Service in the long term.
These are principles meant to guide our everyday work, decision-making, and collaboration.
Here you will find our four key values – defined exactly as agreed.
We encourage everyone to take the time to read through them and keep them in mind in daily work.
HUNGRY / DRIVE
We want more — and we’re not afraid to work for it. Desire for results, energy, drive to win. What it means:
We have ambitions to grow — as individuals, as a team, and as a company.
We look for better solutions, actively improve processes, and take responsibility.
We are performance-oriented — quality, time, discipli
